name: Risotta Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sweet red pepper, finely chopped
1/2 cup Fresh or frozen green peas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave-safe dish, heat butter on high for 20-30 seconds until melted.
2. Stir in onion and cover the dish; microwave for 1 minute.
3. Add broth and rice to the onion mixture. Cover and microwave on high for 6 minutes.
4. Rotate the dish halfway through cooking. Stir in carrot and red pepper, then cover and microwave for an additional 4 minutes on high.
5. Stir peas, water, and basil into the rice mixture. Cover and microwave for another 4 minutes on high.
6. Stir in Parmesan cheese, garlic, and black pepper. Cover and set aside for 6-8 minutes, stirring occasionally until the rice is cooked but slightly chewy.
7. If desired, add additional 2-4 tablespoons of water to achieve a creamier texture.
